title: Make parentheses around a single module parameter optional

features.name: module instantiation with single named parameter without parentheses
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a named parameter override uses #Name syntax without parentheses
features.snippet:
module m1 #(parameter PAR = 1)(); endmodule
m1 #PAR m1();

features.name: module instantiation with single positional parameter without parentheses
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a positional parameter override uses #value syntax without parentheses
features.snippet:
module mno #(parameter int p = 10)(); endmodule
mno #10 mno();
